name: im-not-ai-codex
description: Codex plugin for Korean AI-tell removal and span-grounded humanizing.

interface.shortDescription: Remove Korean AI tells while preserving meaning.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-first Korean humanizer skill that removes GPT-like phrasing, translationese, formulaic structure, and over-polished AI tells with span-grounded local edits.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the humanize-korean skill to remove Korean AI tells from this text while preserving meaning.
